articles.title: San Francisco mayor pushes for tougher rules after the Waymo traffic fiasco
articles.summary: In the wake of a massive hours-long gridlock event, San Francisco mayor Daniel Lurie has told state regulators it's time to put more requirements on robotaxi operators like Waymo.

articles.title: SpaceX suddenly aborts second Starship V3 launch after ignition
articles.summary: The company didn't immediately say what went wrong. SpaceX's stock plunged more than 4% in after-hours trading before paring losses.

articles.title: Coca-Cola suspended production at its Fairlife dairy after a ransomware attack
articles.summary: Coca Cola said dairy production at its Fairlife unit will "remain suspended" in the United States following a hack.

articles.title: Founders Fund hires former OpenAI exec Ryan Beiermeister (and not because of her ‘Mafia’ skills)
articles.summary: Ryan Beiermeister, who demonstrated cool analysis in the Founders Fund YouTube series "Mafia," has joined the firm as a partner.

articles.title: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
articles.summary: Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids that let users create videos starring a digital version of themselves, alongside Gemini Omni-powered tools for generating and editing videos from prompts and reference images.

articles.title: Roblox launches an AI-powered game-creation feature in its mobile app
articles.summary: Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt.

articles.title: Oil giant BP shutters its corporate venture arm after 20 years
articles.summary: BP Ventures is shutting down, ending a nearly 20-year run that was marked by reportedly lackluster returns.

articles.title: Uber’s $14.8B Delivery Hero deal would nearly double its global footprint
articles.summary: Uber has agreed to acquire Delivery Hero in a $14.8 billion all-stock deal that would nearly double the company’s global footprint and create one of the world’s largest food-delivery platforms outside China.

articles.title: The Billion-Dollar Seed Isn’t The Deal You Think It Is
articles.summary: Despite attention-grabbing AI mega-seed rounds, historical data shows that very large first financings rarely produce venture-scale returns because high entry valuations limit investor upside. Instead, argues guest author Ellie McDonald, the strongest venture outcomes have typically come from capita

articles.title: China And AI Lead Asia’s Startup Funding To Multiyear Peak In Q2
articles.summary: Overall, investors poured $42.8 billion into startup funding rounds across all of Asia in Q2 2026, per Crunchbase data. Led by China's $7.4 billion DeepSeek raise, that’s by far the highest quarterly total in more than three years.

articles.title: Moonshot’s Kimi K3 pushes Chinese AI into Fable-level territory
articles.summary: “K3 stands as Moonshot AI's most powerful open-source coding model to date,” Moonshot AI wrote in a press release.

articles.title: Netflix used AI to produce 17 minutes of a documentary ‘twice as fast and at half the cost’—as streaming competition drives up content spending to $20 billion
articles.summary: The streaming company touted the efficiencies of AI in its Q2 earnings, while stressing that movies will still be 'made by people who make movies.'

articles.title: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky’s X account was hijacked in an AI slop hack pushing crypto tokenization
articles.summary: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky appears to have been the target of a cyberattack, sources tell Fortune.

articles.title: The global rich like Peter Thiel are eyeing the exit door. Argentina wants to be a ‘serious contender’ in the migration game
articles.summary: An incoming  citizenship-by-investment scheme could turn Argentina into the next  backup plan for the ultra-wealthy hedging against risks at home

articles.title: Kalshi hits pause on flight cancellation contracts
articles.summary: The prediction markets company has planned to offer the wagers as a way to hedge travel risks, but critics warned the contracts could be misused.

articles.title: Exclusive: Marc Lore says Wonder is gearing up for an IPO after raising $650 million at a $9 billion valuation
articles.summary: Wonder, which owns Grubhub and Blue Apron, is betting robotics, AI, and a nationwide expansion can reshape restaurant delivery before going public.

articles.title: Epstein survivors say Todd Blanche ignored them. Now one Republican senator is making him listen
articles.summary: As Trump’s AG nominee apologizes for redaction errors that left nude photos and names of accusers exposed, Thom Tillis is dangling his decisive vote.

articles.title: The cholesterol shot you couldn’t afford is now a pill
articles.summary: The FDA has cleared Merck’s Lipfendra for patients whose artery‑clogging cholesterol remains high despite statins.

articles.title: China’s Moonshot AI releases Kimi K3, the largest open-source model ever, rivaling top U.S. systems

articles.title: The AI compute gap: Enterprises are buying infrastructure faster than they can measure what it costs
articles.summary: Across 107 enterprises, AI infrastructure spending is accelerating well ahead of the ability to see or steer its economics. Most organizations run their AI on a familiar base of hyperscalers and model-provider APIs, yet the next dollar is aimed at specialized compute almost none of them use today

articles.summary: Across 107 enterprises, AI agents are being given real access to systems and data while the controls meant to contain them lag behind. articles.summary: Across 101 enterprises, the infrastructure that feeds AI agents their business context is being built faster than it can be trusted. articles.title: The agent evaluation gap: Enterprise AI organizations have a reality-alignment problem, not a coverage problem — and most are shipping to production anyway

articles.title: 36氪首发 | 港科大博士创业做机器人全身触觉系统，红杉、瓴智、智元共同押注
articles.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，全身多模态融合触觉解决方案公司模感科技（MoSense）近日完成数千万元天使轮融资，投资方包括红杉中国、高瓴创投及智元机器人。本轮融资资金将主要用于加速研发、团队扩充、算力投入及量产测试体系建设。

模感科技成立于2026年5月，总部注册于上海，在深圳前海设有研发中心，聚焦机器人全身多模态触觉感知系统研发。公司正式成立仅一个月便获得头部美元基金及人形厂商的共同押注。

articles.title: 36氪首发 | 前蔚来、华为智驾核心成员联手创业具身世界模型，三个月内完成数亿元融资

作者 | 乔钰杰

articles.title: 自研氢能催化剂关键材料，稳定性提升50%，「铂氢科技」完成数千万元Pre-A轮融资 | 36氪首发
articles.summary:
36氪获悉，苏州铂氢科技源科技有限公司（以下简称「铂氢科技」）宣布完成数千万元Pre-A轮融资。本轮融资由东运创投领投、新晖资本跟投，老股东熔拓资本追投，资金将主要用于催化剂与膜电极新产线建设、研发及运营团队扩充。

铂氢科技成立于2023年5月，专注于氢能等新兴领域的贵金属催化剂及膜电极等下游产品研发、生产与销售。产品矩阵覆盖燃料电池催化剂（铂碳、铂黑、铂钌黑、铂基合金等系列）和水电解催化剂（氧化铱、铱黑、负载型氧化铱、铱钌合金等）两大品类，并申请发明专利和实用新型专利15余件。

articles.title: 独家 | 智谱 ARR 达到10 亿美元，半年增长 15 倍
articles.summary:
文 | 周鑫雨

编辑 | 张雨忻

智能涌现从多个独立信源处获悉，截至 2026 年 7 月， 智谱的 ARR（年度经常性收入）已经达到 10 亿美元。

截至发稿前，针对上述信息，智谱未回复。

过去一年，AI Coding 和视频生成模型已经成为全球造血能力最强的 AI 赛道。
